## Summary

<!-- What are you adding/updating and why is it valuable for the Supabase community? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npx awesome-lint` on my changes.
- [ ] I verified this is not a duplicate suggestion.
- [ ] The project is tested/documented and is not a toy/BATA project.

### Required for Community Tools / DX Tools

- [ ] I included the **open-source project repository link** (required).
- [ ] I included **testimonial links from users (not the creator)**, e.g. X/LinkedIn/Reddit (required).
- [ ] I understand that non-open-source submissions for Community Tools / DX Tools will be closed.
